holdings.infoBox: KYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 12.09%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 11.95%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 6.64%, Teradyne at 5.85%, and Global X Silver Miners ETF at 5.82%.

overview.description: The Kurv High Income ETF (KYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks income by actively managing exposure to global equity securities and various sophisticated options strategies, involving leverage. The fund holds fixed income securities as collateral for the derivative positions and to potentially enhance returns. KYLD was launched on Oct 30, 2025 and is issued by Kurv.
